name: Candy Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 cups thinly sliced peeled baking apples
Pastry for double crust pie, 9 inches
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, toss the apples with lime juice.
2. Combine the dry ingredients in a separate bowl.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the apples and toss lightly.
4. Place the bottom pastry in a 9-inch pie plate.
5. Fill the crust with the apple mixture.
6. Dot the top with butter.
7. Cover with the top crust, fluting the edges high.
8. Cut steam vents around the edges.
9. Bake at 400°F for 40-45 minutes or until golden brown and apples are tender.
10. Meanwhile, melt the topping ingredients in a small saucepan.
11. Stir in brown sugar and cream, bringing to a boil while stirring constantly.
12. Remove from heat and stir in pecans.
13. Pour over the top crust.
14. Return to the oven for 3-4 minutes or until bubbly.
15. Serve warm.
